rows: Avalon Hotel and Bungalows Palm Springs

Called the front desk multiple times no answer. When someone did answer, was transferred to “reservations” (?) is this just a teenage guy in his bedroom? Spoke zero English, couldn’t understand him, line was breaking up and then he hung up 🤣 I was about to book a 4 night stay in the best room too! No thanks. Will go to  Fairmont!

Dear Ms. Jasmin,     Thank you for your feedback, and I’m very sorry for the frustration you experienced. This is not the level of service we strive to provide, and we are reviewing what happened with our phone and reservations handling.    We would truly love the opportunity to welcome you back and provide a proper experience. If you decide to consider us again, please feel free to reach out directly via email — we would be happy to personally ensure you are well taken care of.    Warm Regards,    Armando Campos   Managing Director  Santa Monica Proper

Beyond frustrated with this property. From start to finish, the experience has been baffling.    I was placed in a room that somehow managed to face a wall and be partially on open to a hallway—dark, awkward, and completely unsuitable.    The real issue, however, is the billing incompetence. At check-in, I explained that I was having a physical issue with my business credit card that was used to book (chip malfunction). So instead of making the front desk type in my corporate card number, I presented my personal card with the clear expectation—standard practice at any reputable hotel—that it would be used for incidentals only, while the booking card would be charged for the stay.    Instead, without explanation or warning, the hotel charged the entire stay to my personal card.    Since the

Dear Mr. Bailey,     Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. I’m truly sorry for the frustration this situation has caused.    I’d like to provide some clarity around our billing procedures. For security purposes, it is hotel policy that the credit card presented at check-in must be physically present and is the card authorized for charges unless a Credit Card Authorization form is completed in advance. If a different card is to be used for payment, a completed authorization form is required at least 24 hours prior to arrival (and typically 48 hours in advance) to allow for proper verification.    Because the corporate card was not physically present at check-in and no prior authorization form had been submitted, our team was required to proceed with the personal card provided.     We truly would have liked for you to have had a seamless experience and to fully enjoy your time at our property. I’m sorry that this situation impacted your stay, and I appreciate you sharing your concerns with us. If you choose to give us another opportunity in the future, please feel free to reach out to me directly—I would be happy to personally assist with your arrangements.    Warm regards,     Armando Campos   Managing Director  Santa Monica Proper

If you're looking for a view stay out of room 243. Im shocked being and amex platinum member booking though amex travel I recieved this room. I commented to amex travel who said the front desk would take care of it. Their solution was to charge an additional $400 per night. Did I mention the late night work in the back alley. So far not a pleasurable stay

Absolutely horrible service, they don't care. It's a shame because it's a beautiful property so close to the Santa Monica beach. At check-in, the front desk is so impatient and doesn't even bother telling us where our room is, and when we asked, she told us to ask someone else. The hostess at every restaurant has been rude. There's never a table available for breakfast no matter what time we try from 7 to 10 am throughout our 3 night stay. Instead of offering alternatives like to go, in room dining, the hostess will just say there's no table. But I clearly see open tables, nobody bothers to clean them. I understand if they are busy, but this problem can be easily solved through a reservation system, and training the hostess to be more empathetic. They closed the main restaurant due to weat

Dear Mr. Tony Pan,     Thank you for your feedback, and we’re truly sorry that your experience did not reflect the level of service we are known for. This is certainly not typical of our team, and we sincerely regret the disappointment it caused. We have addressed your comments directly with our teams, and we genuinely appreciate you taking the time to share them, as feedback like this helps us improve and do better.     We hope to welcome you back for a Proper experience—should you decide to give us a second chance, please feel free to reach out directly, we would be happy to personally ensure you’re able to enjoy our restaurants and all of the outlets that make our property truly special.    Warm Regards,     Armando Campos   Managing Director  Santa Monica Proper
We cancelled an event 18 months in advance and they still would not give us our $5,000 deposit back. Robbery.

We stayed at Santa Monica Proper expecting calm, design, and actual hospitality. What we got was one of the worst hotel experiences I have had in years.    Room 270 is in the so called “wellness wing.” The irony is brutal. The door is paper thin and directly outside is the wellness lounge. Housekeeping and staff were in and out nonstop, with doors that slam like a bank vault closing. This was not occasional. It was every 5 to 10 minutes, including between 11pm and 6am. Add staff walkie talkies bleeding straight through the door and you have a room that is functionally uninhabitable if you value sleep. I slept about two hours.    At 6am I politely asked for a room change. They promised a Grand King, which is only about $20 more than the Performance King. Fine. I did not ask for an upgrade.

We stayed at Santa Monica Proper expecting calm, design, and actual hospitality. What we got was one of the worst hotel experiences I have had in years.    Room 270 is in the so called “wellness wing.” The irony is brutal. The door is paper thin and directly outside is the wellness lounge. Housekeeping and staff were in and out nonstop, with doors that slam like a bank vault closing. This was not occasional. It was every 5 to 10 minutes, including between 11pm and 6am. Add staff walkie talkies bleeding straight through the door and you have a room that is functionally uninhabitable if you value sleep. I slept about two hours.    At 6am I politely asked for a room change. They promised a Grand King, which is only about $20 more than the Performance King. Fine. I did not ask for an upgrade.

Dear Mr. Ladendorf,     Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. I am truly sorry to hear about your experience at Santa Monica Proper. What you described is highly unusual and certainly not the level of comfort, service, or hospitality we are known for.    Please accept my sincere apologies for the noise disturbances, the condition of the room, and the lack of urgency and communication surrounding your room move. A restful, seamless stay is fundamental to our promise, and it is clear that we fell short in several critical areas. I also regret the confusion around the room type and the impact this situation had on your day and overall experience.    We have waived the late checkout fee of $200. While this does not undo the frustration you experienced, we hope it reflects our acknowledgment of the inconvenience caused.    We would appreciate the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with the true Proper experience. Should you choose to return, I would be happy to oversee your reservation to ensure your stay is comfortable, quiet, and restorative from start to finish.    Thank you again for bringing this to our attention. Your feedback is invaluable, and it allows us to address these issues directly and improve moving forward. Please feel free to contact me directly should you wish to discuss this further.    Warm regards,    Armando Campos  Managing Director  Santa Monica Proper
CHECK OUT OTHER HOTELS IN AREA
Negotiating the rate after the room was booked to try to get more money. Went from $200 to $150 upsale after 65000 pts   Not good practice.   Be careful!!!

Dear Mr. Montalvo,     Thank you for sharing your feedback. I’m truly sorry for the inconvenience and frustration caused by your experience with the room upgrade process. This is not the impression we aim to leave with our guests.    Please accept our apologies if the communication around the upgrade felt unclear or uncomfortable. We value transparency and want every interaction to feel respectful and straightforward.    We would truly appreciate the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with the Proper experience that reflects our standards. Should you choose to return, I would be happy to oversee your reservation to ensure your stay is seamless and memorable.    Warm regards,    Armando Campos  Managing Director  Santa Monica Proper

En repetidas ocasiones pedimos que arreglara la caja fuerte que no servía y nunca asistieron igual reportamos una de las ventanas que no cerraba y no asistieron,  la habitación limpia, pero ya un poco pasada de época, no estaba como la foto, muy ruidosa, se escuchaba todo el tránsito de autos y gente de la calle, el lobby muy bonito y el restaurante también, sin embargo las habitaciones nos quedaron a deber! Al final nos hicieron un descuento por lo de la caja fuerte.  Gracias

Estimada Patricia ,    Gracias por compartir sus comentarios sobre su reciente estancia en el hotel.     Agradecemos su opinión y estamos comprometidos con la mejora continua. Gracias por compartir las areas específicas donde podríamos mejorar.   Su satisfacción es nuestra prioridad y esperamos poder atender cualquier inquietud para garantizar una mejor experiencia en su próxima estancia.    Atentamente,  Felipe Reyes Deeney  Director of Guest Experience & Guest Services
For the price and all the hype it is very underwhelming. rooms are very average, one can say below average. And the backside of the hotel is constantly noisy from trucks and garbage pick up.

Dear Mohammad,     Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re sorry you experienced noise disturbance during your stay and that the room didn’t fully meet your expectations. We’d love the opportunity to better accommodate you on a future visit with a quieter room location and a more comfortable setup.    Please feel free to reach out to us directly should you decide to give us another chance.    Warm regards,    Armando Campos   Managing Director  Santa Monica Proper

Good: Receptionist are very friendly, understanding & instant problem-solvers. Well done.    Superb Gym.    Bad: We got a room where we could hear the service door next to our room every few minutes, for 500 bucks a night?!         Plastic toilet seats with no softclosing lids. Just one shower outlet, very difficult to shower without washing hair.         Price performance foodwise disappoints.         Sauna/Cold Plunch is not included in the room fee, very unusual for a 5 star hotel. 150 dollar to rent for 1 person and extra 50 bucks to add another person. What is this?        Crossing paths when you step out of the elevator at ground floor and walking either to the lobby or gym. You really have to watch out to not bump into somebody. The staff is always in a rush and the corridors are ve

It really is a beautiful hotel and has great amenities specifically within wellness. The cleaning lady Lulu was so accommodating and always checked in on us while we were there. The wellness room was infront of the wellness club but there’s no sign so we didn’t know it was there. We booked a private session for the red light therapy but no one showed up for about 30 minutes we ended up cancelling. The room was next to housekeeping so there was constant noise throughout the whole night. Double check on your rooms location. The service could’ve been a lot better but overall we loved the concept it just wasn’t executed for the wellness hotel room.

Dear Ms. Margalef,    Thank you for your feedback. We’re truly sorry for the challenges you experienced, including the red light therapy appointment, room location, and noise. Your comments are incredibly valuable, and we have addressed these concerns with our team to help ensure they do not happen again. We are continuously working to enhance the guest experience and genuinely appreciate your input. We hope you’ll give us another chance to welcome you back for a more seamless and enjoyable stay.    Warm Regards,    Armando Campos   Managing Director  Santa Monica Proper

Beautiful hotel — if you only care about how things look on Instagram.    My first room had absolutely no sunlight. At 2 PM, it still felt like living in a designer cave. We decided to pay extra to upgrade to a “Deluxe Suite,” which, spoiler alert, turned out to be just a slightly bigger king room with sunlight as the only upgrade.    No bathtub (you can pay extra to use their spa pods though 🤡), one tiny sink, a slow old toilet, and a mysterious drain smell that made me rethink basic hygiene.    The room’s soundproofing was so bad we got a free sample of the city nightlife every night.    Service? The front desk was genuinely polite. Everyone else seemed... elsewhere. The bellmen were more invested in their own conversations than in luggage, and some random person with a notebook knocked

Dear Ailee,     Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. While we’re pleased to know you appreciated the design of the hotel, we’re truly sorry that your overall experience did not meet expectations. The comfort and satisfaction of our guests are our top priorities, and we regret that several aspects of your stay fell short.    Please know that your comments have been carefully reviewed with our department leaders, as this is not the level of service we strive to provide—nor is it typical of our guest experience. We are continuously working to enhance our operations and ensure every stay is exceptional. Your feedback is truly valued and helps us continue to improve.    We hope you’ll give us another opportunity to welcome you back for a Proper experience.     Warm regards,     Armando Campos   Managing Director  Santa Monica Proper
I ordered a pizza and a salad at their restaurant. That’s it. No drinks. $75 bill. Completely overpriced. No business should charge this much money.
The WiFi was poor or not working. In n out of service. Making it difficult to work.     The shower was dripping so badly it kept us up. And it was not possible to shut it off entirely.

Dear Charlie,    We’re sorry to see your 2/5 star rating. We would truly appreciate any feedback you’re willing to share so we can better understand your experience and address any concerns. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future for a more seamless and enjoyable stay.    Warm regards,     Armando Campos   Managing Director  Santa Monica Proper
The quality of the food was excellent, the setting lovely and the staff very welcoming and nice.
Took very long to take the order.
Bartender didn’t know how to make the drinks. Very slow service.
long wait for items, price does not meet food.
Strong suggestion: offer breakfast (which we were actually told is available) on rooftop! It would also eliminate apparent table availability downstairs
Long wait in the downstairs restaurant to order drinks and slow service
fantastic cocktails and mezze - great staff upstairs
Website says brunch was available and it was not; lunch food was good but menu seemed very limited

shout out for Brandon - friendly approach and helpful.  I dined alone and was made to feel particularly at home and comfortable and given a nice table - often lone diners can be shoved in a corner and forgotten about it - i do it a lot traveling for work. i appreciated the warm welcome and comfort of Calabra by Brandon and his team.
My brother and I had to sit in a back room. There was a bar there but we had to serve ourselves from the main bar. It was kind of a strange space.
It was preprepared menu based on our team meeting.  The Paella was amazing.
Having my table in the very loud bar was not favorable. It seems that all the tables were located there.

While the food and options were delicious at Calabra, the staff was fairly inattentive and we waited a very long time for an initial greeting. Once we had food, the server didn’t check back in for 20+ minutes, and the restaurant wasn’t very busy. Disappointing experience and given so many other great options for food in Santa Monica, would not recommend based on service.
Great location. Food had too many ingredients. Wish there were some simpler options.
We hit the hostess stand during shift change I guess so took a bit for new host to arrive.
wine wasn’t fabulous for price, dessert we ordered tasted frozen - odd, overall loved bread, food
I will come back just for that dungeness crab toast

We went shortly after check-in, nobody was initially at the door to open it. Seems to be only one person working there, and when trying to book she kept getting interrupted by other guests. We gave up and left.
The rooms need a revamp to align with Proper. Front desk staff could be friendly. It didn’t seem natural.
One of the best spa experiences I've had.
Martha and Victoria were phenomenal ny massage was magical thank you
Spa was sold out so we were unable to use it. Since we were on a mother-daughter trip, this was disappointing.
Meghan was amazing! I’d go back to her again in a heartbeat!
Again would offer sauna or steam with the spa experience.
Wonderful massage!! Definitely will return and loved the products!
Incredible massage as always, I would travel in just to stay at the proper and go to surya!
Promptly delivered by very nice staff
50 for a pot of coffee and a juice are silly (even in LA)!
My bagel was cold and not the one I ordered. I didn’t receive any cream with my coffee.
Estimate for delivery was 15-20 minutes but it took double that.
Phone call downstairs went unanswered twice. Also, the QR code doesn't allow me to pay on my room charge.
Incredible room service food quality and quick delivery of food!!
the salmon i ate was tasty. wish there were more options available for plant-based pescatarians.
Person who answered my call was friendly, patient, thorough and clear in answering my questions about preordering early AM delivery.
I wished there were more options, but the service was prompt and the food was good.
We only recieved one of the two smoothies  we ordered.  The quality of the food was ordinary.
the bill came out way larger than the listing price.  would be nice if room service charges were included in the final price.
excellent room service food quality and quite speedy fulfillment
The food at the restaurants was A+. In room dining was not nearly as good.
The servers were really nice and capabale.
Service in restaurant was least hospitable of all service we received
Seats/Chairs too low and not the most comfortable, too low. Makes for an uncomfortable seating experience.  Tables too low to eat breakfast in a comfortable manner
Expensive for the portion sizes. $100+ for 2 Açaí Bowls, 2 cups of coffee, and 2 side orders of toast is a bit pricey.
Maybe more seating availability for breakfast
Need to improve gluten free  bread; there is much better available
I had a margarita and it was 31$ before tip. Very good but seems a bit much!
see note about host desk. bar staff and waiters super friendly and efficient.
$21 for a titos and Club is quite expensive
The breakfast menu was the best thing about the hotel
How can one be out of bacon?
French fries didn’t arrive with burger until later. Fries were broken small pieces.

the manager at the rooftop 4 helping us find seating and getting us drinks. He was exceptional.     The hostess on Friday night with brown hair, she was quite young. She was extremely friendly and she was from San Francisco at a time in her life. She got us seating, even though every single seat was taken because we were hotel guests. She was very friendly and made us very comfortable.
It took a long time to get a waiter to take our order in the mornings (like 20 minutes in one morning)
This restaurant is a gem.   The staff are the best!   Very professional.   Dinner was superb.  Love the vibe.
I believe our server name was Zach. He was friendly and did a great job.
Service was somewhat slow even though it wasn’t busy at all
Poolside service at night would have been welcomed.
Service was wonderful on pool deck
pool is small and crowded with day goers. we had to get a cabana in order to enjoy the pool for 2 hours.
No chairs to sit on by the pool (all taken). Also no towels at one point so had to wait all wet and cold for a towel restock.

Although the pool area was lovely, dirty towels and used glasses were not cleared off lounge chairs, and their tables promptly when guests left. It would be nice if attendants would clear tables and chairs once guests leave, especially considering guests had to move around to be in the sun and were forced to clean off their own areas. It would also be nice if staff would be proactive in noticing that guests are moving to be in the sun and possibly lower some of the umbrellas.
Loved the pool area. Wish we could have had breakfast or lunch there.
The swimming pool was always full of children who shouted and sprayed water all around; dramatic experience

I shared my issue earlier in the survey. It frankly was not clean from the night before and the towels were all used up both times I went to the pool. It’s a shared space but the two families that were up there on the Friday night (02jan25) didn’t care to share any area and with the noise they made, made it uncomfortable for any of the other families up there.
There was no service the day I was at the pool.
Mostly closed due to weather. Still had to go BOH to find our own towels however.
It was raining but assume great as all other things
Food & Beverage - Not satisfied with item

Palma -- Guest expressed dissatisfaction with the AM bartender about the lack of fresh squeezed juice options. MOD connected with the guest and apologized for the inconvenience and offered a wellness juice instead. Guest ordered a Beetle Juice and calmed down afterwards
No comp necessary; Guest was paid for beetle juice.

Apologized to Mr. SYGYDA that we weren't able to accomodate his request for freshly squeezed orange juice, but did inform him of our wellness juice options. Guest ordered the Beetle and was satisfied.
Guest said "little black fruit flies" are in room, sconce in bathroom keeps detaching, no DND sign
Having HSKP place DND on door, ticket placed for both HSKP and ENG tomorrow after 9/10am to clean/fix
Guest stopped by the front desk, shouting that the elevators are slow, the lobby is too cold, and mentioned another concern that was inaudible due to screaming.
Guest stormed off before fd host could assist or offer anything.

Miss Ernst, a hotel guest, expressed frustration regarding the limited availability of pool chairs during her stay. She approached staff to voice her dissatisfaction with the lack of available seating by the pool, indicating she felt overlooked or inconvenienced.

MOD personally stepped in to address Miss Ernst's concerns. MOD apologized for the inconvenience, and took immediate steps to ensure the guest felt heard and valued. This included calming the situation by making arrangements to accommodate her lunch needs

Miss Ernst's frustration was fully mitigated through the MOD's personal intervention and attentive service recovery. The guest felt heard, valued, and satisfied with the handling of the matter. No further escalation occurred, no additional compensation.
Room too hot- ac not working
apologized for inconvenience and placed ticket w eng
Food & Beverage - Not satisfied with item

A non-hotel guest sent back their Mezcalita, indicating it was not to their liking (specific reason not detailed, but appeared to be a preference issue rather than a preparation error). The cocktail was returned shortly after being served.
The server immediately offered to swap the Mezcalita for another cocktail of the guest’s preference. A replacement drink was prepared and delivered promptly according to their new choice.

The guest accepted the new cocktail, enjoyed it, and expressed satisfaction with the swap. The situation was resolved quickly and amicably with no further complaints, no additional compensation required, and no escalation or follow-up needed.
Front Office - Not satisfied with room

Guest requested to speak with a manager: AMMOD sat and listened to the guest expressing his disappointment with the current room (617) as the AC is not cool enough, black out sheers not working and the safe is not working. AM MOD apologized + offered Wellness lounge access for 24 hours. Satisfied!
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
Guest in room 277 reported flickering lights and two spiders. FDH apologized and relocated guest to room 276. Guest was not satisfied with the room location and was then moved to room 445.
Guest reporting "concert" happening in alleyway, rattling windows, very loud
Apologies extended, reaching out to Security to investigate
Front Office - Unhappy with pricing or policy
"The pricing for that (Wellness Lounge / Recovery Suite) is ludicrous. Saunas all over the world come with the booking at hotels"
Explained pricing for both wellness and recovery suite, and will pass on message to the Team

txt through canary: Someone keeps removing the rest sign from my door and it’s making me feel a little uncomfortable. Because I don’t want anyone entering while Iam. The sign was on my door when I left this morning and I just got some tea came back and it’s now gone.
FD apologized for inconvenience and let the guest know it will not happen again
Front Office - Not satisfied with room

The guest was dissatisfied with her room, stating that it lacked privacy as people could see inside. She also expressed a preference for a room with more natural sunlight. The front desk informed her that no alternative rooms were available for the current day, but one would be available the followi
Guest stropped by the front desk to report that housekeeping had taken his spoon swivel from his room for mixing drinks
houskeeping to follow up asap pls
Front Office - Not satisfied with room

AC wasn't working so engineer went to fix. Guest stood on a chair and put his hand to the vent and barely felt air coming out. Requested portable AC unit but it took too long so he cancelled the delivery.
MOD to follow up in the morning
Front Office - Not satisfied with room

Guest mentioned there is extremely Loud Music/ concert playing in the back alley of near their room and they can't focus on their work in the room. They're willing to move rooms and down grade if necessary.
Food & Beverage - Not satisfied with item
"Please know that the coffee you charge $7 for is mediocre at best.  For the caliber of hotel you have and the prices you charge, the coffee should be significantly better."

Guest sent txt through canary: No AC in the room last night. It registers 64 but was super hot all night. I noticed it was warm when I arrived, but it was late. I'll be departing about 9 o'clock. Can you have someone come in and check it out? The blackout shades don't work either. If you give them a
FD apologized for inconvenience and removed 1 DAF
guest waited 40 min for portable AC to be delivered but was not set up

apologized and offered to send the correct department to assist. The guest was bothered that he waited over 40 min and now he had to wait longer for engineer. The guest refused for eng to assist and stated he will try to sleep
Guest is irate that room has not been cleaned 3 days in a row. She also said the room is terrible. She never wants an ADA room or a room with a tub again, and she complained about the shower head.
Guest was originally c/i to occupied room 449. FD provided keys for new room 431 right away
FD apologized for inconvenience and offered to comp dinner
Food & Beverage - Not satisfied with item

Guest called FD frustrated because she send an email to smp.info regarding billing and she has not heard back. Guest was charged for a coffee at Palma but she was disappointed of the flavor and the delay
FD apologized for inconveniences and refunded CC on file
Guest called to ask for valet but also informed she heard banging/pipe noises in her celling around 3am
Apologized to guest for disturbance and offered to send earbuds to minimize any noise if it occurred again. Guest declined
Front Office - Room Type Request Not Available

Guest was upsold to APS but was told upon arrival it was unavailable due to engineering issue. Upon arrival he was upset but was satisfied with the offer to move into the APS after two nights. After signing the registration form we were informed that Mr. Ganouna would be extending. I called the gues

Guest showed up for 9:30am Recovery Suite, however he was not reserved on boulevard and there was another guest with an appointment at the same time. Guest was very frustrated and showed text confirmation of his appointment time via Canary.
Offered guest a comp session due to the inconvenience and assisted booking additional sessions for the remainder of the stay
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
Guest expressed dissatisfaction with room allocation due to construction noise across the street
FD host apologized and is waiting on follow up with noise fan
FD host apologized and is waiting on follow up with noise fan
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
guest called mentioned she want to move rooms due to not liking the view, due to occupancy we couldn't change the room
we will inform the guest if any other rooms became available

guest ordered food from rooftop yesterday to take on a long day of college tours with her son, she placed in fridge in room and it was frozen solid overnight,she mentioned the cost of food and the intention of eating it today. FOM connect with Palma MOD who was able to put a to go bag together of yo
Front Office - Not satisfied with room

guest is not happy we do not have an upgrade available due to her MB status, she did not believe we were sold out and believes we are with holding a suite or upgrade from her, I showed guest our inventory as we are fully booked, both host and FOM acknowledged her status multiple times, I offered to
guest ended in good spirits after convo with FOM but please alert in all outlets and HWC!!!
Order went to the wrong room
Guest received his food fast enough and was happy.
Guest came to desk around 7pm to notify us that housekeeping didn't come today.
Apologized to guest and said we would make sure housekeeping comes by tomorrow.

host accidentally attempted to open door during escort for other guests in 542, guest called concerned. FOM assured him it was human error, offered to send up something or take care of bfast guest declined and req points, FOM agreed
Front Office - Room key not working
salto system and hms system went down for keys, FD host had to walk guests upstairs and there was a delay, we sent them comp cookies and ginger ale (guest req)

Palma -- Proper Club Member Stephanie Lynn sent back her cobb salad stating the shrimp were poorly prepared. Described as soft and squishy. A salad was re-delivered, and this time the lettuce was grainy.
Comp'd the salad and her beverage. Apologized for missing standards
MOD touched table every step of the process and apologized for missing standards. Guest stated at the end of her meal that her stomach hurt after eating the salad.
guest checked 263 and smelled of smoke, moved guest to RM 217
Immediate room move, guest called back and wants high floor FOM will set up dead move
Room was not passed util 5pm. guest waited about 10-15 minutes for room to pass. Room was pending an ionizer

Apologized to guest for delay and tried to recover with sending a cookie or fruit amenity. Guest declined and said "do not worry about it". Guest seemed sincere for no recovery needed but follow up still may be needed
Guest sent canary text stating they were checking out and wanted luggage to be brought down from room to be stored, however when bellman arrived to room to grab belongings, they weren't too pleased.
Bell apologized chose another time to grab luggage
Bell apologized chose another time to grab luggage
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
Guest sent canary text stating "Is it possible to see if there is an interior room away from the busy road we are next to?  Almost impossible to sleep with all the noise"
FD host thanked guest for bringing this to our attention and will follow up with guest
Guest's blackout/drapes/sheers and AC not working in room, "room is unbearably hot"
Engineering was sent to previous room and confirmed motors could not be fixed, moved guest, see Internal Notes
Room not ready until after 5:30pm, previous guest had 4pm LCO
Guest stepped out for late lunch / early dinner, acknowledged will send luggage to room and have keys ready upon return
Front Office - Not satisfied with room

Guest stopped at the FD to share her frustration. She feels like every time she returns to stay with us her room is smaller and worst.  Guest checked in late and when she got to the room, there was a note for a different guest and she felt like she was given the last room available.  Guest is a top
guest called after check-in to ask for terrace bed cushion, FOM apologized and placed ticket
investigate and temp check guest tomorrow
Apologized and honored room move to ensure he sleeps comfortable.

guest did not get hskp service today -said no DND, informed him of our service hours, placed ticket for towels + water and turndown later, guest also said no water was left in the room yesterday after service. he said he has been having a great stay but the last 24 hours have been weird with hskp se
Guest was in good spirits, follow up tomorrow
Food & Beverage - Not satisfied with item
Palma -- Guest ordered oatmeal (from the kids menu). Did not like the portion size and returned it uneaten. Exchanged for pancakes instead.
Removed the oatmeal and replaced with pancakes. Guest paid full price without issue or pushback.
Connected with Chef on duty, added an adult-size Oatmeal to the breakfast menu offerings.. To be pre-shifted and introduced Tuesday 03/17. Toast buttons updated. Menu Matrix created.
The guest had a rollaway bed delivered without a blanket, so he sent a message to have one delivered. I put in the ticket on Alice at 8:55pm and the guest came to the FD around 9:20pm to follow up.

Guest complained at check-out that it took an hour to receive her luggage at check-in, and that only happened because her husband came down to collect it. The guest also stated that after housekeeping serviced the room, the door was still propped open when they returned.
The Front Desk host apologized for the experience and assured the guest that a member of the team would follow up with her.
moment after guest checked in called FD to report that she walked into the room and there was a dirty blanket on the couch
offered to send the HSKP to make sure everything is up to standard

Guest sent message stating "Hello, we checked into 476 and are inquiring about the prior ask for a room with a balcony. A non-hotel guest ordered the Apple Chicory Salad but received it with the incorrect protein choice due to the server mistakenly selecting the wrong button during order entry. Upon delivery, the guest immediately brought the error to the food runner’s attention.
The food runner promptly alerted the kitchen. The chef immediately refired and prepared a fresh Apple Chicory Salad with the correct protein. The remade dish was delivered to the guest without delay.
The guest received and consumed the corrected salad and was happy with how quickly the mistake was addressed and fixed. No complaints were raised afterward. No further action or follow-up needed.

Awesome hotel. Great vibe. Great people. Great room. Great food. From check  in to leaving - the experience was awesome.
Beautiful hotel and rooms! We enjoyed both restaurants/bars and tried a variety of cocktails and food. We had great service as well.

10/10 stay. Santa Monica Proper completely won me over.    Even before I arrived, Armando, the MD, reached out and was helpful and thoughtful. A really nice touch. My check-in experience deserves a callout. The front desk team was warm, efficient, and incredibly helpful.    Service throughout the hotel was consistently excellent. The pool bar servers were wonderful, and I have to mention the chicory salad I ordered. It was so good I ordered it two days in a row. Craving it now!    The gym was ve

Beautiful hotel with an incredibly helpful and friendly staff - did an engagement party here and everyone went above and beyond, despite an issue with the rooftop restaurant being rained out. They took care of us.

Nous avons passé 15 jours dans cet merveilleux hôtel . Déjà l’hôtel est magnifique. Les chambres sont spacieuses et confortable .   Le petit déjeuner était mon moment préféré de la journée, la carte est très variée et plein d’options saine et healthy . Le personnel est incroyablement chaleureux.     L’hôtel est très bien placé, et tous est à distance de marche : plage , magasin, bar , restaurant.       Si je dois critiquer quelque chose , ça serrai la réactivité de certaines demande , mais nous

We had a wonderful stay at the Santa Monica Proper Hotel. Everything about the experience felt thoughtful and elevated, from the design to the service. The hotel is beautiful, stylish, and incredibly comfortable.    The food was exceptional—truly a standout. Every meal was fresh, creative, and memorable, easily among the best hotel dining we’ve experienced.    Overall, a fantastic stay and a place we’d absolutely return to—even if just for the food. Highly recommended if you’re staying in Santa

Beautifully decorated hotel and lovely rooftop pool area.     Sadly we weren’t able to enjoy it whatsoever due to it being closed for rain the entire time we were there. Disappointing that the hotel did not eventually open the rooftop bar area even though it’s covered. We felt like we lost out on the main amenity that the resort fees were charged for.

Absolutely horrible service, they don't care. It's a shame because it's a beautiful property so close to the Santa Monica beach. At check-in, the front desk is so impatient and doesn't even bother telling us where our room is, and when we asked, she told us to ask someone else. The hostess at every restaurant has been rude. There's never a table available for breakfast no matter what time we try from 7 to 10 am throughout our 3 night stay. Instead of offering alternatives like to go, in room din

This hotel is absolutely charming and elegant. We thoroughly enjoyed the rooftop bar and restaurant, as well as the pool area. The aesthetics and overall ambiance are exceptional, with beautifully repeated circular arches throughout the property. The restaurant’s atmosphere is especially inviting, and we loved relaxing on the large collection of comfortable sofas and chairs. The hotel is truly unique, and its design perfectly reflects that individuality. The décor and customer service were outst

We stayed at The Proper Hotel Santa Monica with our family and had the best trip. The hotel is beautiful, spotless, and thoughtfully designed in a way that feels calm and elevated.   The food was excellent—fresh, healthy, and actually made us feel good. One of the biggest highlights for us was the scent-free environment. No overpowering fragrances anywhere, which meant we slept incredibly well (such a game changer, especially with kids).  Every detail felt intentional, from cleanliness to comfor

We stayed at Santa Monica Proper expecting calm, design, and actual hospitality. What we got was one of the worst hotel experiences I have had in years.    Room 270 is in the so called “wellness wing.” The irony is brutal. The door is paper thin and directly outside is the wellness lounge. Housekeeping and staff were in and out nonstop, with doors that slam like a bank vault closing. This was not occasional. It was every 5 to 10 minutes, including between 11pm and 6am. Add staff walkie talkies b

We stayed at Santa Monica Proper expecting calm, design, and actual hospitality. What we got was one of the worst hotel experiences I have had in years.    Room 270 is in the so called “wellness wing.” The irony is brutal. The door is paper thin and directly outside is the wellness lounge. Housekeeping and staff were in and out nonstop, with doors that slam like a bank vault closing. This was not occasional. It was every 5 to 10 minutes, including between 11pm and 6am. Add staff walkie talkies b
Staff, room service, both lobby and rooftop restaurants.

En repetidas ocasiones pedimos que arreglara la caja fuerte que no servía y nunca asistieron igual reportamos una de las ventanas que no cerraba y no asistieron,  la habitación limpia, pero ya un poco pasada de época, no estaba como la foto, muy ruidosa, se escuchaba todo el tránsito de autos y gente de la calle, el lobby muy bonito y el restaurante también, sin embargo las habitaciones nos quedaron a deber! Al final nos hicieron un descuento por lo de la caja fuerte.  Gracias

The Santa Monica Proper Hotel is not only place to stay, it's amasterclass in modern and bohemian luxury, immediately establishing itself as the premier design hotel in Santa Monica. From the moment you step into the lobby, designed by the brilliant Kelly Wearstler, you are immersed in a world of tactile textures, vintage pieces, and organic tones that exude effortless West Coast sophistication.    Design and Atmosphere  The interior spaces are artfully composed, feeling simultaneously residenti
Super nice and kind staff! The food was excellent! The hotel is gorgeous in my opinion and our room was so clean and spacious! We have enjoyed our stay and will definitely coming back!

A superb hidden gem!  I absolutely LOVED everything about my day drinking and dining experience..  So much so that we had to stay the night.  This had to be one of the best experiences I've had since Rosewood at Miramar beach.
Good: Designerski hotel. Bardzo miła obsługa. Czysto. Kuchnia bardzo dobra. Kawa espresso przygotowana perfekt,co w przypadku hoteli jest wyjątkowe.

This is my third time staying at the Santa Monica Proper Hotel and, as usual, they didn’t disappoint. The rooms are beautifully designed  (with extremely comfortable beds), the service is impeccable, and while the hotel is both luxurious and classy, they have somehow managed to make it quite «homey» and cosy.    The interior designers deserve a medal, and also a thank you from me, as their beautiful choices have inspired some of my own home designs .   When I stay at the Santa Monica Proper, I d

The Proper feels like someone took the very best parts of coastal luxury and stripped out every ounce of pretension, leaving behind a space that’s effortlessly cool. You walk in and the design hits you first, Kelly Wearstler textures, sun-washed tones, curves and stone that make the whole place feel like living inside a modern California daydream.    The rooftop is the real magnet. Ocean breeze, smart cocktails, food that actually tastes as good as it looks, and a view that makes you forget your

We stayed at The Proper for 3 weeks when we were evacuated from our home during the Palisades fires.  The hotel itself is wonderful.  The rooms are a good size and the bathroom amenities are superb with Aesop toiletries.  The staff made us feel as though we were honored guests and couldn't do enough for us.  Because we were there for 3 weeks we got to know quite a few.  So, when we needed to leave our home while it was being fumigated for 2 nights, we of course wanted to return to The Proper and

Good: Receptionist are very friendly, understanding & instant problem-solvers. Well done.    Superb Gym.    Bad: We got a room where we could hear the service door next to our room every few minutes, for 500 bucks a night?!         Plastic toilet seats with no softclosing lids. Just one shower outlet, very difficult to shower without washing hair.         Price performance foodwise disappoints.         Sauna/Cold Plunch is not included in the room fee, very unusual for a 5 star hotel. 150 dollar

I've always enjoyed coming here in the warmer months. The rooftop has a very classy and fun atmosphere. The Mediterranean themed food is also great and the service at the hotel is excellent. I hope to be back soon.
Beautiful, resort like setting. Pool and roof deck are beautiful and service and food are top notch.
loved everything about this hotel, Its my favorite to date, ever and I travel a lot for work. Its beyond stunning, food is delicious, staff amazing!

I wasn't staying at the hotel, just having dinner at Palma in the lobby. My server, German, was outstanding!! He was so kind and thoughtful with his service and went above any beyond to deliver a truly exceptional experience. The food, wine and surprise dessert that delivered was wonderful! Highly recommend, and absolutely ask to sit in German's section when you dine at Palma!!
